ddls:
CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beneficiary of the transaction */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the transaction */,
  "gross_amount" REAL /* Gross amount of the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount of the transaction */,
  "net_amount" REAL /* Net amount of the transaction */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the transaction */,
  "transaction_desc" TEXT /* Brief description of the transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the transaction */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_beneficiary_id FOREIGN KEY ("beneficiary_id") REFERENCES beneficiaries ("beneficiary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiaries" (
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beneficiary */,
  "beneficiary_name" TEXT /* Name of the beneficiary */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the beneficiary */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the beneficiary */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the beneficiary */,
  "beneficiary_type" TEXT /* Type of beneficiary (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beneficiary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "payment_method_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_statuses" (
  "payment_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment status */,
  "payment_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment status */,
  "payment_status_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the payment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the payment is for */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "payment_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment status */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_note" TEXT /* Note or comment for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_payments_payment_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_status_id") REFERENCES payment_statuses ("payment_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_payments_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the beneficiary of the transaction
Reference to the category of the transaction
ID of the user who created the transaction
Timestamp when the transaction was created
ID of the user who last updated the transaction
Timestamp when the transaction was last updated
Contact email for inquiries about the beneficiary
Contact phone number of the beneficiary
ID of the parent category (if applicable)
Unique identifier for each payment method
Unique code for the payment method
Unique identifier for each payment status
Unique code for the payment status

Note or comment for the payment
